div.style: display: inline-block; background-color: #d9e0e7; padding: 6px; margin: 4px; border: 1px solid #8da1b4; border-radius: 5px; line-height: 60%
div.p: version : 9; Dernière mise à jour : 2026-04-20 16:57:29+0200; Langue : fr-FR

ul.li:
Include ce(s) code(s) tel qu'il(s) est (sont) défini(s) dans http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-clinical version 📍4.0.1
CodeAffichageDéfinition
activeActifThe subject is currently experiencing the symptoms of the condition or there is evidence of the condition.
recurrenceRécurrentThe subject is experiencing a re-occurence or repeating of a previously resolved condition, e.g. urinary tract infection, pancreatitis, cholangitis, conjunctivitis.
relapseRechuteThe subject is experiencing a return of a condition, or signs and symptoms after a period of improvement or remission, e.g. relapse of cancer, multiple sclerosis, rheumatoid arthritis, systemic lupus erythematosus, bipolar disorder, [psychotic relapse of] schizophrenia, etc.
inactiveInactifThe subject is no longer experiencing the symptoms of the condition or there is no longer evidence of the condition.
remissionEn rémissionThe subject is no longer experiencing the symptoms of the condition, but there is a risk of the symptoms returning.
resolvedRésoluThe subject is no longer experiencing the symptoms of the condition and there is a negligible perceived risk of the symptoms returning.

div.style: display: inline-block; background-color: #d9e0e7; padding: 6px; margin: 4px; border: 1px solid #8da1b4; border-radius: 5px; line-height: 60%

ul.li:
Include these codes as defined in http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-clinical version 📍4.0.1
CodeDisplayDefinition
activeActifThe subject is currently experiencing the symptoms of the condition or there is evidence of the condition.
recurrenceRécurrentThe subject is experiencing a re-occurence or repeating of a previously resolved condition, e.g. urinary tract infection, pancreatitis, cholangitis, conjunctivitis.
relapseRechuteThe subject is experiencing a return of a condition, or signs and symptoms after a period of improvement or remission, e.g. relapse of cancer, multiple sclerosis, rheumatoid arthritis, systemic lupus erythematosus, bipolar disorder, [psychotic relapse of] schizophrenia, etc.
inactiveInactifThe subject is no longer experiencing the symptoms of the condition or there is no longer evidence of the condition.
remissionEn rémissionThe subject is no longer experiencing the symptoms of the condition, but there is a risk of the symptoms returning.
resolvedRésoluThe subject is no longer experiencing the symptoms of the condition and there is a negligible perceived risk of the symptoms returning.

publisher.value: Agence du Numérique en Santé(ANS) -2 - 10 Rue d'Oradour-sur-Glane, 75015 Paris
